corrected_fields.summary: This crawl captured only navigation and site-wide elements from the New York Fed GSCPI page. The actual index data, methodology description, and visualization content were not retrieved. No substantive information about supply chain pressures, index values, or trends is available from this source.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: Cannot be used for market structure or macro catalyst research. The GSCPI is a published indicator combining global supply chain metrics; without the actual data, this record has no analytical value.
